title: Device Settings - Headset disconnected on Settings screen
scenario: Device Settings screen does not update available options when headset is disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open the Device Settings screen.
4. While on the Device Settings screen, disconnect the headset (e.g., turn off the headset or move out of range).
5. Observe the Device Settings screen after the disconnection.
expected: The Device Settings screen should update to show only options available while the device is disconnected (e.g., limited settings or a "reconnect" prompt).
